title: poa mannii
intro: Poa mannii, also known as Mountain Bluegrass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of China. The medicinal properties of Poa mannii lie in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Poa mannii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Poa mannii is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder for its medicinal purposes.
